{
  "analysis": "The first model is complete but does not meet the accuracy target. Results: full model accuracy 0.5754, quantized model accuracy 0.5782, model size 5.86 MB (well under 150MB). The accuracy of 0.5782 is below the required 0.62. I need to retrain with better hyperparameters and/or preprocessing to improve accuracy while keeping the model under 150MB.",
  "plan": "I will create and run an improved training script with: better text preprocessing (punctuation normalization, lowercase), more epochs (50), higher dimension (200), wordNgrams=2, lower learning rate (0.5), larger bucket size (1000000), and quantization with a higher cutoff. The data files from the first run may still exist, but I will regenerate them with improved preprocessing.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/train_fasttext2.py <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
import fasttext
import os
import re

def clean(text):
    text = str(text).lower()
    text = text.replace('\n', ' ').replace('\r', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
    # normalize punctuation - separate punctuation from words with spaces
    text = re.sub(r"([.!?,;:'\"()\-/])", r' \1 ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

print('Loading data...')
train = pd.read_parquet('/app/data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet')
test = pd.read_parquet('/app/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet')

print('Writing fasttext format files...')
with open('/tmp/train_ft2.txt', 'w') as f:
    for label, text in zip(train['label'], train['text']):
        f.write(f'__label__{int(label)} {clean(text)}\n')
with open('/tmp/test_ft2.txt', 'w') as f:
    for label, text in zip(test['label'], test['text']):
        f.write(f'__label__{int(label)} {clean(text)}\n')

print('Training improved model...')
model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/tmp/train_ft2.txt',
    epoch=50,
    lr=0.5,
    wordNgrams=2,
    dim=200,
    bucket=1000000,
    minCount=2,
    loss='softmax',
    thread=4,
    verbose=2,
)

print('Evaluating full model...')
n, p, r = model.test('/tmp/test_ft2.txt')
print(f'Full model: n={n}, precision={p:.4f}, recall={r:.4f}')

print('Quantizing model...')
model.quantize(input='/tmp/train_ft2.txt', retrain=True, qnorm=True, cutoff=200000, epoch=20, lr=0.5, thread=4)

print('Evaluating quantized model...')
n, p, r = model.test('/tmp/test_ft2.txt')
print(f'Quantized model: n={n}, precision={p:.4f}, recall={r:.4f}')

print('Saving model...')
model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
size = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Model size: {size:.2f} MB')
print(f'Accuracy: {p:.4f}')
if size < 150 and p >= 0.62:
    print('SUCCESS: model meets constraints')
else:
    print('WARNING: model may not meet constraints')
PY
python3 /app/train_fasttext2.py
",
      "duration": 60.0
    }
  ]
}
